titleStmt.title: SII 18.156: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 156. (B.K. No. 124 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar at the south entrance to Ark-killah.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva is dated in the 3rd year of his reign, Prajāpati, Bhādrapada Pūrṇimā, Monday, Lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1151, August 28. The week-day given is a mistake for Tuesday.

It records a grant of land to the god Narasiṁhadēva of Jalamaṇṭapa in Vijayāpura, by the Karaṇas headed by Pergaḍe Mallidēva. Mahāpradhāna and Sēnādhipati Mailārayya and other Karaṇas who were the subordinates of Bijjala (of the Kalachurya family) are stated to be administering Tardavāḍi one-thousand. Bijjala is stated to be the sub-ordinate of Trailōkyamalla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra(ṁ) viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāra
ka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttavire kalyāṇada nelevīḍi noḷu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttavire . tatupādapadumōpajīvi . muḷisiṁ māṟāṁparāti kṣitipara tale
yaṁ kirttu seṁḍāḍanē kēraḷakāṁtārānaḷaṁ māḷavagirikuḷiśaṁ lāḷakāḷāhitārkṣyaṁ baḷavaṁnēpāḷama
ttadviradaniśitavajrāṁkuśaṁ gūrjjarābhrāniḷanaṁdhrakṣmājatīkṣṇakrakacanatibaḷaṁ bijjala kṣōṇipāḷaṁ . tatu
pādapadumōpajīvi . Ahitadhvāṁtasahasrarōciyene śiṣṭabrātakaḷpāvanīruhanītaṁ pu
ruṣārtthamēruvene tannāḻdaṁge cittaprasanna hitaṁ māḷpa maruttanūjanene pempaṁ tāḷdidaṁ du
ṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanōcitaguṇaṁ maiḷāradaṇḍādhipaṁ . tatupramukhakaraṇaṁgaḷ .
tanagaṁ manugaṁ caritaṁ tanagaṁ suratarugavārppu gaṁbhīraguṇaṁ tanagaṁ vārdhdhiga venipaṁ ghanaśauryya
ṁ mallanahitakuḷahṛtsella . surabhūruhadageyaṁ bittaradiṁ paramēṣṭi taṁdu manujākṛ
tiyiṁ viracisi puṭṭisidanenalu dorevettaṁ cīlanakhiḷalakṣmīlōla . rāmaṁge sukavika
ḷpārāmaṁganavadyavāgvadhūkacasumanōdāmaṁge sakaḷaguṇagaṇadhāmaṁgeṇeyoḷare
vasumatīmaṁḍaḷadoḷu . budhajanadodavirddāpatkudharamanaudāryyavajradiṁ poyduya
śōmbudhiyoḷavagāha vidhisidanadhanara nidhi mādhavaṁ diśāsindhuravaṁ . vacana . Enisi negaḷda
śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati daṁḍanāyakaṁ maiḷārayyapramukhakaraṇaṁgaḷu tarddavā
ḍi sāsiramaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipālanadināḻdarasugeyyuttavire . kaṁda . bhaya
lōbhadurllabhaṁ durjjayavairimadēbhasiṁhanene negaḷdiḻdaṁ jayalakṣmīpati taḷavṛttiya pe
rggaḍe mallidēvanene pogaḷadarāru . piriyakaraṇaṁgaḷu . kaṁ . vācāḷarccaḻabaḻigarśśū
cīvakrarpparārtthanipuṇarenippī nīcarmmāḻpare karaṇada rēcaṇanaṁtiṣṭajanakavāśritaja nakaṁ .
sujanajanavanajadinamaṇi nijakulakairavasudhāṁśubiṁbaṁ vibudhabrajacittava
llari pārijātanene negaḻdanavaniyoḷu kadārayi parahitacaritadoḷaṁbaracarapatigaṁ migi
lenippa bammarasanoḷēṁ doreye tudinālageyaṁ beraliṁdaṁṭaṁṭu toḍadu barevaṇale
gaḷu . bhūviśrutaviśadayaśaṁ dēvaddijagurupadābjabhṛṁgaṁ budhakaḷpāvanījane
nisi negaḻdaṁ gōviṁdaṁ sukavinikarapikamākaṁdaṁ . © . Iṁtivaru . svasti śrīmaccāḷu
kyacakravartti traiḷōkyamalladēvavariṣada mūṟeneya prajāpatisaṁvatsarada bhā
drapadada puṇnami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇaparbba nimittavāgi śrīmadrā
jadhāni vijayāpurada jaḷamaṁṭapada śrīnārasiṁhadēvargge taḷavṛttiya pe
rggaḍe mallidēvapramukhakaraṇaṁgaḷu kencanārāyaṇabhaṭṭara sthaḻada matta
ru nūṟu 100 kaḍitaverggaḍe vaijanāthayyana sthaḻada mattaru nūṟu 100
Antu mattaru yinnūṟaṟa grāsa paridhāna nibaṁdhavaṁ sarbbanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa
ru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śāsanumidāvadelliya śāsanavārittarēke salisu
ve nānī śāsanamaneṁba pātakanā sakaḷaṁ rauravakke gaḻagaḻaniḻiguṁ . ©© mattavā
śrīnārasiṁhadēvariṁ paḍuvaṇa saṁjemaṭhakke kaṁtiya holadiṁ paḍuva
sthaḻada hanneraḍu mattarkkeyyaṁ sarbbanamaśyavāgi biṭṭaru . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 18.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
